message:
feat(messaging): replace placeholders with full implementations for capability, federation, service, session, and subject registry

Comprehensive expansion of five FABRIC messaging subsystem modules from
scaffold placeholders to working implementations:

- capability/mod.rs (+444 lines): Full capability-layer building blocks
  including FabricCapability, FabricCapabilityGrant, FabricCapabilityId,
  FabricCapabilityRegistry (concurrent registry with grant/revoke),
  FabricCapabilityScope, SubjectFamilyTag, and PublishPermit/
  SubscribeToken capability tokens
- capability/routing.rs (+800 lines): Capability-aware routing with
  subject pattern matching, route tables, and permission-gated dispatch
- capability/tokens.rs (+722 lines): GrantedFabricToken with
  cryptographic binding, CapabilityTokenSchema for IR integration,
  and token lifecycle management
- federation.rs (+697 lines): Federation bridge infrastructure with
  FederationBridge, FederationRole (Gateway/Leaf), GatewayConfig,
  LeafConfig, MorphismConstraints, ReplicationConfig, CatchUpPolicy,
  EdgeReplayConfig, EvidenceShippingPolicy, InterestPropagationPolicy,
  OrderingGuarantee, and TraceRetention
- service.rs (+772 lines): Contract-carrying service schemas including
  ServiceContractSchema, ServiceRegistration, ValidatedServiceRequest,
  PayloadShape, ReplyShape, ProviderTerms, CallerOptions,
  BudgetSemantics, CancellationObligations, CompensationSemantics,
  OverloadPolicy, MobilityConstraint, CaptureRules, and EvidenceLevel
- session/contract.rs (+1182 lines): Session-typed protocol contracts
  with GlobalSessionType, SessionType (Send/Recv/Choice/Branch/Rec/End),
  SessionBranch, ProtocolContract with full validation, Label, RoleName,
  MessageType, TimeoutLaw, TimeoutOverride, CutoffPath,
  CompensationPath, EvidenceCheckpoint, and SessionPath
- session/mod.rs: Re-export all new contract types
- subject.rs (+363 lines): SubjectRegistry — concurrent schema registry
  with RegistryFamily classification (Command/Event/Query/Snapshot/
  Internal), RegistryEntry, thread-safe registration and lookup
- mod.rs: Wire capability, federation, service, and session as public
  modules; re-export all new public types from each module; expand
  subject re-exports with registry types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
